channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwe’s gold rush adds fuel to a deadly surge in malaria
item.description: Zimbabwe’s gold rush adds fuel to a deadly surge in malaria — via RFI #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: RFI

item.title: Chinhoyi Crash Death Toll Rises To 7 As Police Officer Driving Impounded Vehicle Dies
item.description: Police Reveal Who Was Driving Before Chinhoyi Crash Death Toll Rose To 7 The death toll from the horrific Chinhoyi road crash has risen to seven after another victim died in hospital, with police confirming that the officer driving an impounded vehicle was among those killed. The fatal collision happened on 16 July 2026 along [...] The post Chinhoyi Crash Death Toll Rises To 7 As Police Officer Driving Impounded Vehicle Dies appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Futsal returns as Banda calls for discipline, growth
item.description: Fungai Muderere THE Zimbabwe Futsal Association Bulawayo Province League action bounces back on Sunday with exciting fixture eight programme lined up at the FIFA Hope Centre in Gwabalanda, where... #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: 20 school children die in Uganda, Uber buys Glovo for $15bn, Somalia’s cabinet fights over chamber of commerce
item.description: Twenty children and one adult die in a Ugandan bus crash, Uber buys Glovo, Somalia’s cabinet moves to control the private sector’s main body, and Harare insists diaspora cash will hold as nearly 100,000 citizens return from South Africa. Ten stories from across Africa for Saturday, July 18, 2026. (via The African Exponent) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The African Exponent

item.title: UK-based legal expert Cde Tapfumaneyi lands key role in Zanu-PF affiliate @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Gibson Mhaka UNITED Kingdom-based politician and legal expert Cde Pardon Tapfumaneyi, who last year joined the ruling party, Zanu-PF under its Dzokai Kumusha/Buyani Ekhaya programme, has been appointed patron... (via Ebusiness Weekly) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Andy Flower Rejects England Test Coach Job And Reveals Why @ZimCricketv
item.description: Andy Flower Rules Himself Out Of England Top Job Zimbabwe cricket great Andy Flower has ruled himself out of becoming England’s next Test coach, ending speculation that he could return to a role in which he previously enjoyed remarkable success. The Zimbabwean confirmed he has in #Zimbabwe #Sport #ZimbabweSport #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zandile Tshuma’s Family Reveals Burial Plans As They Await UK Decision
item.description: Zandile Tshuma’s Parents Share Their Final Wish For Daughter And Granddaughters The family of the late Zandile Tshuma and her two daughters has revealed its wish to bury the trio in Zimbabwe as they wait for UK authorities to decide when their bodies can be released for repatriat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s sole lithium salt plant unable to process third-party metal, official says
item.description: Miners fret over January 2027 concentrate export ban deadline The post Zimbabwe’s sole lithium salt plant unable to process third-party metal, official says appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Nine churchgoers perish after kombi plunges into dam @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: NINE people died in Masvingo Province this Friday morning while enroute to a prayer session. Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) national spokesperson, Commissioner Paul Nyathi confirmed the incident. “ZRP is investigating the circumstances in which nine people died at Ruti Dam, Buhera, on 17 July 2026, at around 0430 hours when the driver of a Nissan [...] The post Nine churchgoers perish after kombi plunges into dam appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Police officer was behind the wheel in Chinhoyi horrific crash after impounding vehicle, death toll rises to seven @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: A ZIMBABWE Republic Police (ZRP) officer was involved in a fatal head-on collision while driving a vehicle he had impounded from an alleged traffic offender causing several fatalities. The accident which occurred at the 109km peg along the Harare–Chirundu road, near the Mashonaland West Provincial Heroes Acre on Thursday afternoon left six people dead on [...] The post Police officer was behind the wheel in Chinhoyi horrific crash after impounding vehicle, death toll rises to seven appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mason Mushore joins FC Platinum, to reunite with brother McKinnon
item.description: FC Platinum have bolstered their squad with the signing of midfielder Mason Mushore, who joins the Zimbabwean giants after parting ways with South African Premiership side AmaZulu. Mushore’s stay at AmaZulu lasted just six months before the two parties agreed to go their separate ways, paving the way for his return to Zimbabwe. The move [...] The post Mason Mushore joins FC Platinum, to reunite with brother McKinnon appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mnangagwa commits to ease formalisation costs for SMEs
item.description: PRESIDENT Emmerson Mnangagwa Friday committed to ease formalisation costs for the Small to Medium Enterprises (SMEs) in a bid to assist them graduate into larger entities. Informalisation in Zimbabwe represents over 76% of total economic activity, driven primarily by currency instability, high formal taxation, and job scarcity. The Zimbabwe National Statistics Agency (Zimstat) reports that [...] The post Mnangagwa commits to ease formalisation costs for SMEs appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe banks on untapped gold as State miner eyes new discoveries
item.description: ZIMBABWE”S State-owned Mutapa Gold Resources (MGR) says vast areas of its mining concessions remain largely unexplored, presenting a major opportunity for new gold discoveries as the government steps up exploration to unlock the country’s mineral wealth. Speaking during Mines Minister Polite Kambamura’s technical visit to Freda Rebecca Gold Mine in Bindura, MGR Chief Executive Officer [...] The post Zimbabwe banks on untapped gold as State miner eyes new discoveries appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bangladesh snap 34-run victory over Zimbabwe to level T20 series
item.description: Bangladesh secured a 34-run victory over Zimbabwe in the latest T20 international at Queens Sports Club in Bulawayo, producing a disciplined all-round performance to level the contest. After being put to bat, Bangladesh posted a competitive total of 186 runs, in a process they lost 5 wickets in 20 overs The Tigers opening batsmen Saif [...] The post Bangladesh snap 34-run victory over Zimbabwe to level T20 series appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe Targets Capital Markets Overhaul to Finance Infrastructure and Drive Vision 2030
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe is accelerating reforms to transform its capital markets into a modern financing platform capable of mobilising long-term domestic and foreign investment, as Government shifts its focus from traditional bank lending towards more diversified sources of economic financing. Finance, Economic Development and Investment Promotion Minister Professor Mthuli Ncube says deeper, broader and technology-driven [...] The post Zimbabwe Targets Capital Markets Overhaul to Finance Infrastructure and Drive Vision 2030 appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Jay-Z Set for Windfall as Indonesian Coffee Chain Targets US$1.4 Billion Stock Market Debut
item.description: NEW YORK – Hip-hop billionaire Jay-Z could be in line for a significant financial windfall as Indonesian coffee giant Kopi Kenangan explores plans for an initial public offering (IPO) that could value the fast-growing company at as much as US$1.4 billion. The proposed listing, which is still in its early stages, would mark another major [...] The post Jay-Z Set for Windfall as Indonesian Coffee Chain Targets US$1.4 Billion Stock Market Debut appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: R. Kelly Seeks Trump Clemency in Bid to Cut Short 30-Year Prison Sentence
item.description: CHICAGO – Disgraced R&B singer R. Kelly has formally appealed to U.S. President Donald Trump for clemency, seeking to have his 30-year federal prison sentence commuted as his legal team claims the jailed musician faces serious threats to his safety behind bars. According to U.S. media reports, Kelly’s attorneys have submitted a formal clemency petition [...] The post R. Kelly Seeks Trump Clemency in Bid to Cut Short 30-Year Prison Sentence appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail
